applicationWindow.notes: South Dakota elk hunting is residents-only. There is no application path, no point system, and no OTC option for non-residents. Verified at gfp.sd.gov.

nr.notes: Non-residents are NOT eligible for South Dakota elk tags. Do not include SD elk in NR hunting plans.

pointSystem.notes: No NR point system — non-residents cannot apply.

otc.notes: No NR OTC. Residents-only species in South Dakota.
